VK_GRAPHICS_PIPELINE_LIBRARY_VERTEX_INPUT_INTERFACE_BIT_EXT, VK_IMAGE_COMPRESSION_FIXED_RATE_19BPC_BIT_EXT, VK_TENSOR_VIEW_CREATE_DESCRIPTOR_BUFFER_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT_ARM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_CLUSTER_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_PROPERTIES_NV, VK_RAY_TRACING_LSS_INDEXING_MODE_SUCCESSIVE_NV, VK_INDIRECT_COMMANDS_TOKEN_TYPE_STATE_FLAGS_NV, VK_FORMAT_R10X6G10X6B10X6A10X6_UINT_4PACK16_ARM, VK_TOOL_PURPOSE_TRACING_BIT, VK_DRIVER_ID_INTEL_OPEN_SOURCE_MESA_KHR, VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT, VK_PIPELINE_CACHE_HEADER_VERSION_ONE, VK_EXTERNAL_MEMORY_HANDLE_TYPE_OPAQUE_WIN32_KMT_BIT_NV, VK_FORMAT_B8G8R8G8_422_UNORM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_H264_INLINE_SESSION_PARAMETERS_INFO_KHR, VK_FORMAT_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_422_UNORM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_COPY_IMAGE_TO_IMAGE_INFO_EXT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_COPY_MEMORY_INDIRECT_FEATURES_KHR, VK_LAYER_SETTING_TYPE_STRING_EXT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_DECODE_VP9_PROFILE_INFO_KHR, VK_VIDEO_ENCODE_AV1_RATE_CONTROL_REFERENCE_PATTERN_FLAT_BIT_KHR, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_MULTIVIEW_PER_VIEW_RENDER_AREAS_FEATURES_QCOM, VK_PIPELINE_CREATE_2_RAY_TRACING_OPACITY_MICROMAP_BIT_EXT, VK_DEVICE_QUEUE_CREATE_INTERNALLY_SYNCHRONIZED_BIT_KHR, VK_IMAGE_CONSTRAINTS_INFO_CPU_WRITE_OFTEN_FUCHSIA, VK_OPACITY_MICROMAP_SPECIAL_INDEX_FULLY_UNKNOWN_OPAQUE_EXT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_2_DATA_GRAPH_BIT_ARM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_PICTURE_RESOURCE_INFO_KHR, VK_FORMAT_R16G16B16_UINT, VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_FLOAT_CONTROLS_PROPERTIES_KHR, VK_FORMAT_R16G16_SFLOAT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_INDIRECT_DEVICE_ADDRESS_INFO_NV, VK_PIPELINE_COLOR_BLEND_STATE_CREATE_RASTERIZATION_ORDER_ATTACHMENT_ACCESS_BIT_EXT, VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_2_VERTEX_INPUT_BIT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDER_PASS_CREATE_INFO_2_KHR, VK_DEBUG_REPORT_OBJECT_TYPE_DESCRIPTOR_SET_LAYOUT_EXT, VK_DEBUG_REPORT_OBJECT_TYPE_CU_MODULE_NVX_EXT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_RENDERING_INFO_KHR, VK_FORMAT_ASTC_5x4x4_SRGB_BLOCK_EXT, VK_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_GROUP_TYPE_TRIANGLES_HIT_GROUP_NV, VK_BUFFER_USAGE_2_DESCRIPTOR_HEAP_BIT_EXT, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_VIDEO_ENCODE_H264_SESSION_PARAMETERS_GET_INFO_KHR, VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_NONE, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_IMPORT_MEMORY_SCI_BUF_INFO_NV, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_HOST_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSITION_INFO, VK_PIPELINE_CREATE_2_CAPTURE_INTERNAL_REPRESENTATIONS_BIT_KHR, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PHYSICAL_DEVICE_MAINTENANCE_3_PROPERTIES_KHR, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_RASTERIZATION_LINE_STATE_CREATE_INFO_EXT, VK_LOGIC_OP_OR, VK_INDIRECT_STATE_FLAG_FRONTFACE_BIT_NV, VK_ACCESS_2_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT_KHR, VK_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM, VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_PIPELINE_SHADER_STAGE_REQUIRED_SUBGROUP_SIZE_CREATE_INFO_EXT,
